title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Skill India Mission Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Skill India Mission Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Skill India Mission Partners family as a Curriculum Developer in Hyderabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Skill India Mission Partners:
Skill India Mission Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Skill India Mission Partners!
